documentation_template.overview: This template defines the exact structure that MUST be followed for every product documentation file. Each product gets its own markdown file following this comprehensive format.

section.name: header
section.example: # Lenovo ThinkPad X1 Carbon - Product Documentation

section.name: product_information
section.format: ## Product Information - **Product ID:** [ID] - **Product Name:** [Name] - **Category:** [Category] - **Price:** [Price with currency] - **Stock:** [Stock quantity] units - **Rating:** [Rating]/5.0

guidelines.guideline: Include currency symbol with price (e.g., ₹115,000 or $999)
Stock should be a number followed by "units"
Rating should be out of 5.0 (e.g., 4.8/5.0)

section.name: product_summary
section.format: ## Product Summary [2-3 sentences describing the product, its purpose, and target audience]

guidelines.guideline: Write 2-3 comprehensive sentences
Describe what the product is and what it does
Mention the target audience or ideal use case
Use professional, engaging language

section.example: Lenovo ThinkPad X1 Carbon is a premium business ultrabook offering exceptional value and performance. This 14-inch laptop features 16GB RAM and 512GB SSD, designed for professionals who demand quality, reliability, and cutting-edge features in their computing devices.

section.name: key_features
section.format:
## Key Features
### [Feature Name] **Impact Level:** High/Medium/Low [Detailed description of the feature and its benefits]
[Repeat for 4-5 key features]

guidelines.guideline: Include 4-5 key features
Each feature needs a descriptive name
Impact Level must be: High, Medium, or Low
Provide detailed description (2-3 sentences) explaining the feature and its benefits
Focus on features that differentiate the product

section.name: use_cases
section.format:
## Use Cases
### [Use Case Title] [Description of who this is perfect for]
**Benefits:** - [Benefit 1] - [Benefit 2] - [Benefit 3] - [Benefit 4] - [Benefit 5]
[Include 3-4 use cases]

guidelines.guideline: Include 3-4 distinct use cases
Each use case should target a specific user type or scenario
Provide 1-2 sentence description of who it's perfect for
List 4-5 specific benefits for that use case
Make benefits concrete and actionable

section.name: technical_specifications
section.format:
## Technical Specifications
### Core Specifications - **Category:** [Category] - **Model:** [Model] - [Other key specs] - **Price:** [Price] - **Rating:** [Rating]/5.0 stars
[Include detailed technical specifications organized by category]

guidelines.guideline: Start with Core Specifications section
Organize specs into logical categories (Performance, Display, Connectivity, etc.)
Be specific and detailed with technical details
Include realistic specifications appropriate for the product type
Use proper technical terminology

section.name: customer_sentiment
section.format:
## Customer Sentiment
### Overall Rating: [Rating]/5.0 [Brief summary of customer feedback]
### Positive Aspects 1. **[Aspect]** - [Description] [List 5-7 positive aspects]
### Common Feedback 1. **[Topic]** - [Feedback] [List 4-5 common feedback points]

guidelines.guideline: Provide realistic customer sentiment analysis
List 5-7 positive aspects with descriptions
List 4-5 common feedback points
Make feedback authentic and balanced
Include both strengths and constructive feedback

section.name: recommendations
section.format:
## Recommendations
### Complementary Products [List of products that enhance this product]
### Alternatives to Consider [List of alternative products]

guidelines.guideline: Suggest 4-6 complementary products
Suggest 2-3 alternative products
Make recommendations relevant and helpful

section.name: faqs
section.format:
## Frequently Asked Questions
**Q: [Question]** A: [Detailed answer]
[Include 5-6 relevant FAQs]

guidelines.guideline: Include 5-6 relevant questions
Questions should address common concerns
Provide detailed, helpful answers
Cover topics like features, comparisons, value, usage

section.name: best_for
section.format: ## Best For - [Target audience 1] - [Target audience 2] [List 5-7 ideal user types]

guidelines.guideline: List 5-7 ideal user types or scenarios
Be specific about who would benefit most
Consider different use cases and needs

section.name: conclusion
section.format: ## Conclusion [2-3 sentences summarizing the product's value proposition and ideal use case]

guidelines.guideline: Write 2-3 comprehensive sentences
Summarize the product's key value proposition
Reinforce who it's best for
End on a positive, conclusive note

section.name: footer
section.format: --- **Document Version:** 1.0 **Last Updated:** [Month Year] **Product ID:** [ID] **Stock Status:** [Stock] units available

guidelines.guideline: Always use version 1.0 for new documents
Use current month and year
Include product ID from extracted data
Include stock quantity

content_quality_standards.standard: Be specific and detailed in all descriptions
Create authentic-sounding customer reviews and feedback
Ensure all sections are comprehensive and valuable
Maintain consistency across all product documents
Generate real-world kind of product details including reviews
